_comment: Sealed E2E latency reference. Updated only with `make perf-e2e-save`. The perf-e2e-gate command fails if e2e_us.p99 regresses >10% from this value. Current p50=11780us and p99=233447us reflect the cluster as measured on 2026-05-22; see specs/2/22-perf-verification.md. The gate catches regression from this floor; it does not certify the <50us design budget.
